page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 2 dedicated vCPUs mapped to 2 physical cores of an Intel Xeon 8369B processor running at a base clock speed of 2.7 GHz. The instance is equipped with 8.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. It does not include local storage or dedicated GPU hardware, and it operates with a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Performance benchmarks indicate average single-core capabilities but lower multi-core and memory throughput. The single-core stress-ng CPU test scored 1880.19, and single-threaded gzip compression reached 27.58 GB/sec, both placing in the average tier. However, multi-core stress-ng performance at 1926.99 and large-block memory read/write bandwidth at 7.6 GB/sec and 6.13 GB/sec fall into lower performance brackets. Passmark database operations scored 1044.56, and Redis SET operations achieved 1.99 million operations per second.

Given the dedicated CPU allocation and balanced resource ratio, this instance offers predictable compute performance for entry-level workloads. However, the lack of local storage and lower multi-threaded and memory bandwidth metrics present tradeoffs for data-intensive applications. It is best suited for lightweight general-purpose workloads, basic web serving, single-threaded processing tasks, and small-scale application hosting that do not require high memory bandwidth or local disk I/O.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.large is a general-purpose virtual machine instance configured with 2 dedicated vCPUs and 8.0 GB of RAM, running on an Intel Xeon 8369B processor at 2.7 GHz. Utilizing the KVM hypervisor, this instance provides a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio but lacks local storage and GPU accelerators. Benchmark results show average single-core performance, with a stress-ng single-core score of 1880.19 and single-threaded gzip compression of 27.58 GB/sec. However, multi-core performance and memory bandwidth are relatively weak, as evidenced by a multi-core stress-ng score of 1926.99 and large-block memory read speeds of 7.6 GB/sec. With a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps, this instance is qualitatively cost-effective for entry-level, non-distributed applications. It is best suited for lightweight web serving, single-threaded processing, and small-scale general-purpose workloads.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.g7.large is a general-purpose instance featuring 2 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 8.0 GB of RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, suitable for lightweight, single-threaded workloads.

tagline: A dedicated dual-core x86_64 virtual server offering a balanced memory-to-vCPU ratio for entry-level, single-threaded computing workloads.

8.0 GB of system memory with a balanced 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio
Baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps with no bundled local storage
Average single-core performance suitable for single-threaded tasks
Best suited for lightweight web serving and entry-level general-purpose applications
